Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 36 

MCO_TXNMY_IND 

LABEL: Managed Care Organization Taxonomy Indicator — Ever in Calendar Year 

DESCRIPTION: Indicates whether the provider’s taxonomy value maps to the managed care organization provider 
category; ever in the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: MCO_TXNMY_IND 

LONG NAME: MCO_TXNMY_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): APR base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual
